name: jylhis-reverse-engineering
description: Binary reverse-engineering skill — triage, disassembly and decompilation, ELF / PE / Mach-O internals, static and dynamic analysis (radare2 / rizin, Ghidra headless, gdb / pwndbg, Frida, binwalk), CTF crackmes, and malware analysis safety. Covers AI-assisted RE via MCP servers (GhidraMCP, radare2-mcp, frida-mcp, CutterMCP).
